product.name: Valve Only 1/2 Deck-Mount
product.productOverview: 1/2 QUARTER TURN, DECK MOUNT TYPE; 15 TO 17 GPM FLOW RATE; ASME A112.18.1, CSA B125.1 APPLICABLE STANDARD; HIGH FLOW VALVE ENSURE OPTIMAL WATER FLOW PERFORMANCE INCLUSIONS/FEATURES; DECK MOUNT BATH FAUCET USED ON ITEM; BRASS VALVE MATERIAL; KOHLER[R] BRAND; WARRANTY LIMITED LIFETIME; K-300 MODEL
product.featuresAndBenefits: This 1/2" Ceramic Valve Works Behind the Scenes to Give You Optimal Performance from Your KOHLER Faucet; It Features Brass Construction for Durability and Long-Lasting Ceramic Valves that Offer a Lifetime of Smoothly Functioning Water Flow; High-Flow Valv
